style_effects: Flickering translucent violet aura with jagged edges, casting elongated, distorted shadows that twist unnaturally around Charizard's form; slow drifting mist particles with faint purple luminescence drift upward in erratic patterns, while energy pulses of deep indigo light pulse through its ghostly skin, creating a chilling blue-white ghostly glow that illuminates the surrounding mist, Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
